xapi:message.subject: Zebra Technologies - Radio Data Request for Missing Data

xapi:email.xapi:message:
Dear Supplier,

We have received ASN(s) for the enclosed listed Serial numbers but did not receive the corresponding data feed containing the applicable Radio Data through our Cleo platform.

Please review the attached file and send the applicable Radio Data for the enclosed list of Serial #s via the Cleo feed.

Thank you,

Zebra Technologies



Note: Please do not reply to this email. This mailbox does not allow incoming messages.

xapi:message.subject: Zebra Technologies - Update Service Repair Attribute

xapi:email.xapi:message:
Dear Agile Team,

We are receiving IMEI details from suppliers for the attached list of items, Please update the Service Repair Attribute for them in the system.

Thank you,

Zebra Technologies



Note: Please do not reply to this email. This mailbox does not allow incoming messages.
